_comment: Each feature starts with passes: false.
_comment2: ONLY the passes field may be changed — by the agent, after verified end-to-end testing.
_comment3: Never remove, reorder, or restructure entries. Append new ones at the end.

title: Core library — CRUD, file management, search, fetch, PDF extraction
notes: 86 tests passing. Full E2E workflow verified. Local adapter, 4 API clients, two-stage PDF extraction, public sync API wired.

title: Staging workflow — two-store model, merge/QA gate, duplicate detection
notes: 176 tests passing (unit + integration). Staging CRUD, merge pipeline, duplicate detection by normalized title/ISBN, file archival and cleanup, public sync API wired.

title: List pagination — paginated, projected summary for all list endpoints
notes: 193 tests passing. ReferenceRow/FileRow projection, 10-record pages, citekey sort, merge file rename fix included.

title: Local filter — filter_references with predicate search + discover_references rename
notes: 210 tests passing. filter_references with query/author/year/ref_type/has_file/staging predicates. search_references renamed to discover_references. Sources updated: Latindex/SciELO removed (inaccessible), OpenAlex+DOAJ added, retry strategy (3 attempts, 5s delay) applied to all adapters, single apis.email config for polite-pool sources.

title: Configurable citekey generation — pattern/separator/etal/disambiguation_suffix via config.json
notes: 224 tests passing. CitekeySettings model with field validators; token evaluator for {author[N]}/{year}; title-word and letter disambiguation strategies.

title: Full deduplication — detect and resolve duplicate references beyond DOI matching
notes: 241 tests passing. uid-based record identity (tier-1: DOI/arXiv/ISBN authoritative; tier-2: semantic hash). compute_uid() in services/uid.py, uid written at staging, is_duplicate() uid-only, merge gates semantic confidence with allow_semantic=True, backfill_uid.py script.

title: Peer management — Ed25519 identity, peer registration, device lifecycle, pull-time verification
notes: 264 unit tests + 1 integration test passing. Ed25519 keypair generation, peer registration, device add/revoke, signature verification, pull verifier with rejection log. cryptography>=42.0 dep added.

title: Distributed sync phase 1 — append-only change log, push/pull, conflict resolution, S3-compatible backend
notes: 328 unit tests + 5 integration tests passing. HLC timestamps (services/hlc.py), ChangeLogEntry/ConflictRecord/PushResult/PullResult/SyncConfig models, S3 adapter (boto3 optional import), conflicts_store adapter, sync service (push/pull/create_snapshot), SyncCompositeAdapter (change log on every write), Settings.sync wiring, 6 public API functions (push/pull/create_snapshot/list_conflicts/resolve_conflict/restore_reference). _field_timestamps on Reference for per-field LWW tracking.

title: Blob sync — content-addressed file distribution over S3
notes: 399 unit + integration tests passing. sha256 content-addressed blobs, link_file/unlink_file ops in change log, lazy get_file with cache, prefetch_blobs, pull LWW for blob_ref, upload_bytes for .meta sidecars. No regressions.

title: Database audit — integrity checks, orphaned files, missing archives, schema violations
Cloud backends — S3+DynamoDB and MongoDB+GCS adapters
Semantic search — natural language queries across the local library
Citation graph analysis — influence chains, gap detection, research lineages
Social annotation — structured, shareable annotations on reference objects
